title: ALIMCO Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 89 Apprentice Posts
description: Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 89 Apprentice Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass, ITI, 12th, and Diploma can use this chance and apply for the ALIMCO Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the application ends...
